steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts “a single person” receiving the prize with the case where “work attributed to two or three individuals” is recognized. The decisive clue is in the example: “Jennifer Doudna was among those awarded”—the word “among” signals multiple people receiving it simultaneously.

steps.title: Select the word for shared receipt
steps.content:
Jointly directly means together, which expresses how the prize is given to multiple recipients at once.

Ceremoniously, reluctantly, and retroactively address manner, attitude, and timing instead—none capture the shift from singular to shared distribution.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
